hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(^|[[:space:]])--no-verify([[:space:]]|$)"; then echo "BLOCKED: --no-verify is not allowed. Fix the underlying hook issue instead." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]] && [[ -f "$FILE" ]]; then MATCHES=$(grep -n "console\.log" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true); if [[ -n "$MATCHES" ]]; then echo "WARNING: console.log found in $FILE:" >&2; echo "$MATCHES" >&2; fi; fi'
